objective: Implement the independently reviewable F-0098 snapshot foundation without claiming final learner UI closure: produce a versioned published paper_snapshot whose paper_section contains explicit question_group containers with stable public identity, order, shared material, computed subtotal and nested paper_question children, while standalone questions remain explicit. Add one shared traversal contract so practice, mock_exam, exam_report and API mappers consume both the new canonical shape and immutable legacy flat snapshots without dropping or duplicating questions. Preserve scoring, answer, authorization, projection and existing session behavior; do not modify schema, migration, permissions or organization training.
blockedFiles: permission, entitlement, role or learner visibility changes
dependency, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push
F-0096, F-0097, F-0099 or another independent finding

authoritativeChainEvidence.requirement: Module 02 section 3.7 requires paper_section and question_group structural containers with system-computed subtotals; decision package D14 requires skill flows to group by material, question_group and paper_section.
authoritativeChainEvidence.producer: student-flow-runtime-repository currently queries question_group only to copy publicId/title/material onto each paper_question; paper_snapshot remains an unversioned section-to-question flat shape and loses group order/subtotal/container identity.
authoritativeChainEvidence.consumers: practice partially reconstructs groups from repeated per-question fields, while mock_exam, exam_report and mappers independently traverse paperSections[].paperQuestions and therefore cannot consume an explicit group hierarchy.
authoritativeChainEvidence.compatibility: existing practice/mock_exam rows contain immutable legacy flat snapshots, so one shared reader must preserve them while treating snapshotVersion=2 nested groups as authoritative and fail closed on malformed v2 containers.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: shared snapshot traversal, practice/mock/report services and mappers, student UIs, learner projection and P0 snapshot/scoring baselines are the direct tests and regressions.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: This foundation makes the canonical snapshot and all current consumers hierarchy-aware but does not yet claim final grouped mock/report presentation or organization-training import closure; F-0098 remains open_partitioned for the learner presentation partition.

resumeAnchor.condition: after foundation closeout, continue the same finding with grouped learner mock/report presentation; do not reopen F-0096 or decide F-0097 without requirement authority

knownHolds.F-0096: authoritative product decision is missing for upload size, MIME and magic-byte policy; no semantics invented
knownHolds.F-0097: accepted ADR-002 names exam-papers as stable REST while current runtime is a pseudo 503 alias; retirement versus compatibility requires architecture decision

validationEvidence.tddRed: shared reader, producer, practice, mock_exam, exam_report and student UI failures reproduced before GREEN
validationEvidence.lint: 20 changed TypeScript source and test files, exit 0
validationEvidence.build: Next.js build, 100 routes, exit 0; pre-existing NFT trace warning only
validationEvidence.stateAndDiff: strict JSON/YAML parse and git diff --check, exit 0
validationEvidence.adversarialReview: pass after correcting legacy progress gaps, noncanonical score parsing and standalone null material preservation
validationEvidence.proofBoundary: repository snapshot assembly has static and unit evidence only; no runtime database execution was performed
